description_long: This is a dark-colored glass bottle with a long, slender neck and a slightly wider base, typical of beverage containers such as beer or soda bottles. The bottle features a yellowish-orange label with black text and a logo, which appears on the front and wraps partially around the sides. Several black bottle caps with a yellow logo are placed nearby, suggesting the bottle is designed to be sealed with a crown cap. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly, and the label is neatly affixed without visible wrinkles or damage. The bottle's cap is currently attached, and the overall appearance is clean and intact. No visible liquid is apparent inside the bottle due to its opaque exterior.
description: A dark glass bottle with a yellow-orange label and black crown cap, accompanied by several matching bottle caps. The bottle is sleek, glossy, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow-orange label with black text and logo, and the bottle cap on top; several loose caps are visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the label's text wrapping around, and more of the label's details visible; loose caps are closer to the bottle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the label with fine print and barcode, and the bottle's smooth, dark surface; loose caps are in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label partially visible and the bottle cap on top; loose caps are to the left.
attribute_label_or_branding: Yellow-orange label with black text and a logo, placed on the front and partially around the sides; additional fine print and barcode on the back label.
